user.title: Connect Claude AI
user.description: Optional. Add your Anthropic API key for AI-generated medicine summaries, or leave blank and configure it later under integration options.

notify.title: Notification Service
notify.description: Which HA notify service should receive expiry alerts?

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Check that the key is correct and active in your Anthropic console.
error.permission_denied: Access denied for this API key (account, billing, or organization restrictions).
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Anthropic (network, DNS, firewall, or proxy). Check Home Assistant outbound HTTPS.
error.dependency_missing: The anthropic Python package is missing. Restart Home Assistant after installing the integration so dependencies install.
error.model_not_found: The Claude model used by this integration was not found. You may need an integration update, or your account may not have access to this model.
error.rate_limit: Anthropic rate limit reached. Wait a moment and try again.
error.bad_request: Anthropic rejected the request. See the Home Assistant log for details.
error.api_error: Unexpected error from Anthropic. See the Home Assistant log for details.
